response.justification: While Bogdan is a strong software engineer with 20 years of experience and appropriate staff-level seniority, this principal role requires deep specialization in hardware architecture, SoC/IP modeling, and AI accelerator optimization that is entirely absent from his resume. His career has been focused on web, backend, and general software infrastructure rather than hardware-software co-design or performance analysis of silicon systems. The recent AI-agent infrastructure work does not translate to the DNN training/inference optimization and GPU architecture expertise this role demands.
strengths: 20 years of professional software development with demonstrated optimization of performance-critical systems (low-latency async I/O, caching, real-time databases)
Staff-level seniority at reputable company with proven ability to work across diverse technical domains
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure and strong learning track record across languages, platforms, and problem domains
concerns: No experience with SoC/IP modeling, the core required skill and primary responsibility of this role
Career entirely in software/backend development with no hardware architecture, accelerator design, or co-design background
Missing specialized expertise in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD systems, and deep neural network optimization

key_factors.factor: Missing core domain expertise (SoC/IP modeling, GPU/accelerator architecture)
Appropriate seniority level and technical depth for principal-IC role
Software engineering focus vs. required hardware-infrastructure specialization
